title: hardenbergia monophylla var. alba
intro: Hardenbergia monophylla var. alba, also known as white coral pea, is a flowering plant native to Australia that belongs to the family Polygalaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hardenbergia monophylla var. alba include its potential to help with urinary tract issues and its antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its ability to protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
